hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A git commit was just made. Use the codex:rescue skill to review the committed changes (git diff HEAD~1..HEAD), then apply any bugs, security issues, or quality findings directly to the working tree. Do not create a new commit for these fixes."}}'; exit 2
hooks.rewakeSummary: Codex review requested for last commit
